query: SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Sean%' OR name LIKE '%Gavin%' OR name LIKE '%Yaegar%' OR name LIKE '%Jaeger%' OR name LIKE '%Goldstein%' OR name LIKE '%gavgol%' OR name LIKE '%seanjae%' OR email LIKE '%seanjae%' OR email LIKE '%gavgol%' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Sean%' OR name LIKE '%Gavin%' OR name LIKE '%Yaegar%' OR name LIKE '%Jaeger%' OR name LIKE '%Goldstein%' OR name LIKE '%gavgol%' OR name LIKE '%seanjae%' OR email LIKE '%seanjae%' OR email LIKE '%gavgol%' ORDER BY name;
